targetSentence: 你想得倒美！不工作还想拿工资？

targetSentence: 你倒蛮会说话的。

targetSentence: 昨天我的约会不太顺利，她让我等了足足两个小时。

targetSentence: 习主席祝全国人民以及全体海外华人新年快乐。

targetSentence: 南方人喜欢吃甜的东西，北方人则喜欢吃咸的东西。
targetPinyin: nánfāng rén xǐhuān chī tián de dōngxī，běifāng rén zé xǐhuān chī xián de dōngxī。

targetSentence: 美国人比较开放，他们喜欢认识新的朋友，中国人则比较害羞，他们更喜欢与亲密的朋友交往。
targetPinyin: měiguó rén bǐjiào kāifàng，tāmen xǐhuān rènshì xīn de péngyǒu，zhōngguó rén zé bǐjiào hàixiū，tāmen gèng xǐhuān yǔ qīnmì de péngyǒu jiāowǎng。
targetMeaning: Americans are more open-minded. They like to meet new friends, while Chinese people are more shy.

targetSentence: 我老婆习惯安静、自然的乡村生活，我则习惯喧闹繁忙的大城市生活。
targetPinyin: wǒ lǎopó xíguàn ānjìng、zìrán de xiāngcūn shēnghuó，wǒ zé xíguàn xuānnào fánmáng de dà chéngshì shēnghuó。
targetMeaning: My wife is used to quiet, natural country life, and I am used to the noisy and busy city life.

targetSentence: 南方人喜欢吃甜的东西，而北方人则喜欢吃咸的东西。
targetPinyin: nánfāng rén xǐhuān chī tián de dōngxī，ér běifāng rén zé xǐhuān chī xián de dōngxī。
targetMeaning: Southerners like to eat sweet things, while northerners like to eat salty things.

targetSentence: 美国人比较开放，他们喜欢认识新的朋友，而中国人则比较害羞，他们更喜欢与内圈的朋友交往。
targetPinyin: měiguó rén bǐjiào kāifàng，tāmen xǐhuān rènshì xīn de péngyǒu，ér zhōngguó rén zé bǐjiào hàixiū，tāmen gèng xǐhuān yǔ nèiquān de péngyǒu jiāowǎng。
targetMeaning: Americans are more open, they like to meet new friends, while Chinese people are more shy, they prefer to socialize with friends in the inner circle.

targetSentence: 这儿有高压电线，请不要靠近，以免发生危险。

targetSentence: 天气这么好，与其在家看电视，不如出去走走。

targetSentence: 我们家由我妈妈做主，她说什么我和爸爸就做什么。

targetSentence: 作为商店经理，所有的事情都由你做主，出了事情也由你负责。

targetSentence: 极权主义政府通常是由一人或一党做主，而民主社会通常是由全民做主。
targetPinyin: jíquán zhǔyì zhèngfǔ tōngcháng shì yóu yī rén huò yī dǎng zuòzhǔ，ér mínzhǔ shèhuì tōngcháng shì yóu quánmín zuòzhǔ。
targetMeaning: The totalitarian government is usually dominated by one person or one party, while the democratic society is usually dominated by the whole people.

targetSentence: 你不要去那个地方旅游，一来是那边的宾馆很贵，二来那边也没有什么好看的风景。
targetPinyin: nǐ bù yào qù nàgè dìfāng lǚyóu，yīlái shìnàbiān de bīnguǎn hěn guì，èrlái yěnàbiān méiyǒu shénme hǎokàn de fēngjǐng。

targetSentence: 三十年前，邓小平之所以推动改革开放，一来是为了提高人民的生活水平，二来是为了让中国经济从计划经济转变到市场经济。

targetMeaning: Thirty years ago, the reason why Deng Xiaoping promoted reform and opening up was to improve people's living standards and to transform the Chinese economy from a planned economy to a market economy.

targetSentence: 谅他也不敢！

targetSentence: 人家都不屑跟你说话，你就不要热脸贴在冷屁股上了。

targetSentence: 有些官员表面上不屑于收受贿赂，其实暗地里他们比谁收的都多。
targetPinyin: yǒuxiē guānyuán biǎomiàn shàng bùxièyú shōushòu huìlù，qíshí àndìlǐ tāmen bǐ shuí shōu de dūduō。
targetMeaning: Some officials seem to disdain to accept bribes, but in fact they secretly receive more than anyone.

targetSentence: 出门没有带钱，不得不向朋友借。
targetPinyin: chūmén méiyǒu dài qián，bùdébù xiàng péngyǒu jiè。
targetMeaning: I didn't bring money to go out, so I had to borrow it from my friends.

targetSentence: 很喜欢那件衣服，可是没带够钱，只好不买了。
targetPinyin: hěn xǐhuān nàjiàn yīfú，kěshì méi dài gòu qián，zhǐhǎo bù mǎi le。
targetMeaning: I like that dress very much, but I didn't bring enough money, so I had to buy it.

targetSentence: 刚下飞机，还没找到宾馆，行李不得不寄存在朋友那。
targetPinyin: gāng xià fēijī，hái méi zhǎodào bīnguǎn，xínglǐ bùdébù jìcún zài péngyǒu nà。
targetMeaning: Just after getting off the plane, I haven't found a hotel yet, so I have to store my luggage with my friend.

targetSentence: 刚下飞机，还没找到宾馆，行李只好寄存在朋友那。
targetPinyin: gāng xià fēijī，hái méi zhǎodào bīnguǎn，xínglǐ zhǐhǎo jìcún zài péngyǒu nà。
targetMeaning: I just got off the plane and I didn't find a hotel yet, so I had to leave my luggage with my friend.

targetSentence: 迫于生计，他不得不到大城市去打工。
targetPinyin: pòyú shēngjì，tā bùdébù dào dàchéngshì qù dǎgōng。
targetMeaning: Forced to make a living, he had to work in a big city.

targetSentence: 你这么做，效果反而不好。
targetPinyin: nǐ zhème zuò，xiàoguǒ fǎnér bù hǎo。
targetMeaning: If you do this, the effect is not good.

targetSentence: 你这么做，反而效果不好。
targetPinyin: nǐ zhème zuò，fǎnérxiàoguǒ bù hǎo。
targetMeaning: If you do this, it will not work well.

targetSentence: 外面下雨，我却没带伞。
targetPinyin: wàimiàn xiàyǔ，wǒ què méi dài sǎn。
targetMeaning: It was raining outside, but I didn't bring an umbrella.

targetSentence: ChicagoBulls没赢最后一场比赛，反而是Knicks。
targetPinyin: Chicago Bulls méi yíng zuìhòu yī cháng bǐsài，fǎnér shì Knicks。
targetMeaning: Chicago Bulls did not win the last game, but Knicks.

targetSentence: 他们都觉得Knicks会输掉最后一场比赛，结果他们反而赢了。
targetPinyin: tāmen dōu juédé Knicks huì shū diào zuìhòu yī cháng bǐsài，jiéguǒ tāmen fǎnér yíng le。
targetMeaning: They all felt that Knicks would lose the last game, but instead they won.

targetSentence: 我根本不知道如何有效地管理。
targetPinyin: wǒ gēnběn bù zhīdào rúhé yǒuxiào dì guǎnlǐ。
targetMeaning: I simply don't know how to manage it effectively.

targetSentence: 你为什么说昨天在街上看到我了？
targetPinyin: nǐ wèishénme shuō zuótiān zài jiēshàng kàndào wǒ le？
targetMeaning: Why did you say that you saw me on the street yesterday?

targetSentence: 他只是一个小孩子，根本没见过这么吓人的事情。
targetPinyin: tā zhǐ shì yī gè xiǎo háizǐ，gēnběn méi jiàn guò zhème xiàrén de shìqíng。
targetMeaning: He was just a child, and he had never seen such a scary thing.

targetSentence: 今天新同事又迟到了，他到底想不想在这里做了？
targetPinyin: jīntiān xīn tóngshì yòu chídào le，tā dàodǐ xiǎng bù xiǎng zài zhèlǐ zuò le？
targetMeaning: Today the new colleague is late again, does he want to do it here?

targetSentence: 你的包这么重！你到底带了多少东西？
targetPinyin: nǐ de bāo zhème zhòng！nǐ dàodǐ dàile duōshǎo dōngxī？
targetMeaning: Your bag is so heavy! How much did you bring?

targetSentence: 据实报道
targetPinyin: jù shí bàodào
targetMeaning: According to actual reports

targetSentence: 根据事实报道
targetPinyin: gēnjù shìshí bàodào
targetMeaning: According to fact reports

targetSentence: 据说他去上海了。
targetPinyin: jùshuō tā qù shànghǎi le。
targetMeaning: It is said that he went to Shanghai.

targetSentence: 据传首相将要辞职。
targetPinyin: jùchuán shǒuxiāng jiāngyào cízhí。
targetMeaning: The Prime Minister is rumored to be resigning.

targetSentence: 据他说，灾情并不是很严重。
targetPinyin: jù tā shuō，zāiqíng bìng bùshì hěn yánzhòng。
targetMeaning: According to him, the disaster was not very serious.

targetSentence: 恢复体力。
targetPinyin: huīfù tǐlì。
targetMeaning: Physical recovery.

targetSentence: 中国1977年恢复了高考。
targetPinyin: zhōngguó 1977nián huīfù le gāokǎo。
targetMeaning: China resumed the college entrance examination in 1977.

targetSentence: 地铁恢复了正常运行。
targetPinyin: dìtiě huīfù le zhèngcháng yùnxíng。
targetMeaning: The subway has resumed normal operation.

targetSentence: 他的身体恢复了。
targetPinyin: tā de shēntǐ huīfù le。
targetMeaning: His body recovered.

targetSentence: 社会秩序恢复了。
targetPinyin: shèhuì zhìxù huīfù le。
targetMeaning: Social order has been restored.

targetSentence: 我打他，他居然没哭。
targetPinyin: wǒ dǎ tā，tā jūrán méi kū。
targetMeaning: I beat him, he didn't cry.

targetSentence: 我帮他，他反而生气了。
targetPinyin: wǒ bāng tā，tā fǎnér shēngqì le。
targetMeaning: I helped him, but he was angry.

targetSentence: 经过治疗，他的病情不仅没有好转，反而恶化了。
targetPinyin: jīngguò zhìliáo，tā de bìngqíng bùjǐn méiyǒu hǎozhuǎn，fǎnér èhuà le。
targetMeaning: After treatment, his condition not only did not improve, but worsened.

targetSentence: 吃了这些减肥药，不但没有瘦，反而更胖了。
targetPinyin: chīle zhèxiē jiǎnféiyào，bùdàn méiyǒu shòu，fǎnér gèng pàng le。
targetMeaning: After taking these diet pills, not only did they not lose weight, but they became fatter.

targetSentence: 雨不仅没停，反而越下越大了。
targetPinyin: yǔ bùjǐn méi tíng，fǎnér yuè xià yuè dà le。
targetMeaning: Not only did the rain stop, but it was getting bigger and bigger.
